'''鈭歸-j-zh''' ('''wajazha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hektograph|hektograph]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-j-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hektograph|hektograph]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-j-zh
|-
! Lemma
| wajazha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wajazhithi|wajazhithi]] || [[word:wajazhiji|wajazhiji]] || [[word:wajazhishi|wajazhishi]] || [[word:wajazhi|wajazhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wajazhuthuth|wajazhuthuth]] || [[word:wajazhujuj|wajazhujuj]] || [[word:wajazhushush|wajazhushush]] || [[word:wajazh|wajazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wajazhuthu|wajazhuthu]] || [[word:wajazhuju|wajazhuju]] || [[word:wajazhushu|wajazhushu]] || [[word:wajazhu|wajazhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wajazhufuth|wajazhufuth]] || [[word:wajazhufuj|wajazhufuj]] || [[word:wajazhufush|wajazhufush]] || [[word:wajazhuf|wajazhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wajazhethe|wajazhethe]] || [[word:wajazheje|wajazheje]] || [[word:wajazheshe|wajazheshe]] || [[word:wajazhe|wajazhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wajazhothoth|wajazhothoth]] || [[word:wajazhojoj|wajazhojoj]] || [[word:wajazhoshosh|wajazhoshosh]] || [[word:wajazh|wajazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wajazhotho|wajazhotho]] || [[word:wajazhojo|wajazhojo]] || [[word:wajazhosho|wajazhosho]] || [[word:wajazho|wajazho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wajazhofoth|wajazhofoth]] || [[word:wajazhofoj|wajazhofoj]] || [[word:wajazhofosh|wajazhofosh]] || [[word:wajazhof|wajazhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wajazh忙th忙|wajazh忙th忙]] || [[word:wajazh忙j忙|wajazh忙j忙]] || [[word:wajazh忙sh忙|wajazh忙sh忙]] || [[word:wajazh忙|wajazh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wajazhathath|wajazhathath]] || [[word:wajazhajaj|wajazhajaj]] || [[word:wajazhashash|wajazhashash]] || [[word:wajazh|wajazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wajazhatha|wajazhatha]] || [[word:wajazhaja|wajazhaja]] || [[word:wajazhasha|wajazhasha]] || [[word:wajazha|wajazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wajazhafath|wajazhafath]] || [[word:wajazhafaj|wajazhafaj]] || [[word:wajazhafash|wajazhafash]] || [[word:wajazhaf|wajazhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:wajazhasha|wajazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gowajazhasha|gowajazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiwajazhasha|gokiwajazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:wajazhn眉sha|wajazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gowajazhnkn眉sha|gowajazhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiwajazhn眉sha|gokiwajazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wajazhsh毛sha|wajazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowajazhnksh毛sha|gowajazhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwajazhsh毛sha|gokiwajazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wajazhrosha|wajazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowajazhnkrosha|gowajazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwajazhrosha|gokiwajazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wajazhmusha|wajazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gowajazhnkmusha|gowajazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwajazhmusha|gokiwajazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:wajazhsherasha|wajazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gowajazhnksherasha|gowajazhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiwajazhsherasha|gokiwajazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:wajazhngasha|wajazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gowajazhnkngasha|gowajazhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiwajazhngasha|gokiwajazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wajazhyasha|wajazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gowajazhnkyasha|gowajazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiwajazhyasha|gokiwajazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:wajazhyamasha|wajazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gowajazhnkyamasha|gowajazhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiwajazhyamasha|gokiwajazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:wajazhn眉sh毛sha|wajazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowajazhnkn眉sh毛sha|gowajazhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwajazhn眉sh毛sha|gokiwajazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wajazhn眉rosha|wajazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowajazhnkn眉rosha|gowajazhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwajazhn眉rosha|gokiwajazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wajazhn眉musha|wajazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowajazhnkn眉musha|gowajazhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwajazhn眉musha|gokiwajazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:wajazhsh毛n眉sha|wajazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowajazhnksh毛n眉sha|gowajazhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwajazhsh毛n眉sha|gokiwajazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wajazhsh毛rosha|wajazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowajazhnksh毛rosha|gowajazhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwajazhsh毛rosha|gokiwajazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wajazhsh毛musha|wajazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowajazhnksh毛musha|gowajazhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwajazhsh毛musha|gokiwajazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:wajazhron眉sha|wajazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowajazhnkron眉sha|gowajazhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwajazhron眉sha|gokiwajazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:wajazhrosh毛sha|wajazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowajazhnkrosh毛sha|gowajazhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwajazhrosh毛sha|gokiwajazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wajazhromusha|wajazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowajazhnkromusha|gowajazhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwajazhromusha|gokiwajazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:wajazhmun眉sha|wajazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowajazhnkmun眉sha|gowajazhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwajazhmun眉sha|gokiwajazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:wajazhmush毛sha|wajazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowajazhnkmush毛sha|gowajazhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwajazhmush毛sha|gokiwajazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wajazhmurosha|wajazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowajazhnkmurosha|gowajazhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwajazhmurosha|gokiwajazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:wajazh|wajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:w忙j忙zh|w忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:howajazh|howajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:how忙j忙zh|how忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohowajazh|hohowajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohow忙j忙zh|hohow忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉wajazh|n眉wajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉w忙j忙zh|n眉w忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉wajazh|n眉n眉wajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉w忙j忙zh|n眉n眉w忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂wajazh|n茂wajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂w忙j忙zh|n茂w忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂wajazh|n茂n茂wajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂w忙j忙zh|n茂n茂w忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luwajazh|luwajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luw忙j忙zh|luw忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluwajazh|luluwajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluw忙j忙zh|luluw忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liwajazh|liwajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liw忙j忙zh|liw忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliwajazh|liliwajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliw忙j忙zh|liliw忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kowajazh|kowajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kow忙j忙zh|kow忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokowajazh|kokowajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokow忙j忙zh|kokow忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kewajazh|kewajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kew忙j忙zh|kew忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekewajazh|kekewajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekew忙j忙zh|kekew忙j忙zh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
